timeline.title: Learning Timeline

layersPage.title: Four-Layer Architecture
layersPage.subtitle: 19 mechanisms of Hermes organized into 4 layers, each answering one core question

questions.core: What is the bare minimum an agent can do?
questions.hardening: How does an agent work reliably?
questions.runtime: How does an agent serve multiple platforms?
questions.platform: How does an agent become an extensible platform?

descriptions.core: Message loop, tool system, task planning, prompt assembly, context compression, session storage — the 6 mechanisms shared by all agents.
descriptions.hardening: Memory system, skills, permissions, error recovery, CLI architecture — 5 stability problems that must be solved in production.
descriptions.runtime: Gateway multi-platform access, cron scheduling, hook extension, subagent delegation — 4 capabilities that take an agent beyond CLI.
descriptions.platform: Provider runtime, MCP tool integration, plugin system, RL trajectory generation — 4 mechanisms that make Hermes an extensible agent platform.
